Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong momentum candidates at the top of the ranker, with LINC and TNGX both scoring above 97 and passing all technical gates. LINC demonstrates balanced, steady momentum across all timeframes (161.75% annual return) with perfect ratio consistency (5/5 passes) and outstanding resilience on down-market days (98.9 spy-day score), earning it rank #1 with a composite score of 97.5. TNGX shows more explosive characteristics with an extraordinary 858.72% one-year return but displays an extreme ratio anomaly—the 1w/1d ratio of 124.97 suggests highly concentrated recent gains rather than the smooth progression seen in LINC, though it still maintains all SMA gates and a strong bad-spy score of 1.16. Both tickers significantly outpaced SPY and QQQ across all measured periods, with TNGX's year-to-date 841% outperformance being particularly notable, though the concentration of its momentum in shorter timeframes introduces more volatility risk compared to LINC's distributed gains.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
